title: Claude Code AI SEO: How to Rank #1 with Claude Code
summary: Julian Goldie presents an agentic SEO system that integrates Claude Code with a user's own Google Search Console data to identify rankable keywords and automatically generate and deploy SEO content across multiple sites. The approach bypasses common keyword tools to find less competitive opportunities, with a demonstrated case of increasing site traffic from 2 to 200+ daily clicks.
writeup: The video demonstrates an agentic SEO workflow that connects Claude Code to a site's own Google Search Console data, using that data to surface rankable, less competitive keywords and then automatically generate and deploy content across multiple sites. The method deliberately bypasses conventional keyword research tools in favor of opportunities pulled from existing search performance. Julian Goldie shows a case where this approach raised a site from 2 to more than 200 daily clicks. Key takeaways: the integration of Claude Code with Search Console drives keyword selection, and content generation and deployment run as an automated, multi-site pipeline.
